example_reviews: No ads, no subscription, great UI, insanely wide variety of sounds and meditation courses absolutely 10/10 app
finally a good app without ads thanks
Good app with a nice selection of guided meditations. Unlike all the other ones it doesn't feel like it needs me to eventually upgrade to a wellness subscription.
It is advertised as a free app with no paywalls but you can't even try the app without a payment demand.
It says its free, but you can't even try it out unless you donate money first!!
Nag screen did not go away after donating a couple dollars...
whenever I try to play a meditation, the app crashes on me
whenever my screen goes black, the app also stops
the update has ruined my streak. I can't synch across devices anymore
Great app, but audio tends to stop when I have my earbuds on.
made me calmer and helps me sleep, super grateful for this app.
This app has saved my life. I don't know where I'd be without the things it has taught me
it has helped me get over my cannabis addiction to which I am highly grateful for
Best meditation app for someone having anxiety
Easy to start. Beginners course was very helpful for someone who has never meditated before.
I'm following the courses and feel like I have really been able to meditate for the first time.
Free and quality support for your meditation practice. Especially great for beginners
if you are looking for a free meditation app to kickstart your meditation journey, Install this app now
